category_sources: source_facts.description says "RISC-V Virtual Machine"; official README describes RVVM as a virtual machine/emulator for RISC-V guests.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rvvm; official repository title and README heading use RVVM.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README documents features and links the official wiki for the full feature list and additional documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/LekKit/RVVM, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a RISC-V virtual machine; official README lists RISC-V guest emulation, JIT backends, guest OS support, networking, and isolation features.
